creator: ryanrfrederick@gmail.com
text:
When updating dns/bind99 from 9.9.5_16 to 9.9.5_17 the following error is encountered during package creation:

===>  Building package for bind99-9.9.5_17
Creating package /usr/ports/dns/bind99/work/pkg/bind99-9.9.5_17.tbz
Registering depends: idnkit-1.0_3 libxml2-2.9.1_1 libiconv-1.14_3 openssl-1.0.1_13.
Registering conflicts: bind9*-9.[45678].* bind9*-sdb-9.[45678].* bind-tools-9.* bind-tools-9.*.
Creating bzip'd tar ball in '/usr/ports/dns/bind99/work/pkg/bind99-9.9.5_17.tbz'
tar: /usr/local/etc/rndc.conf.sample: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: Error exit delayed from previous errors.
pkg_create: make_dist: tar command failed with code 256
*** [do-package] Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/dns/bind99.
*** [install] Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/dns/bind99.
